case_title: OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JOSE D. DE OLIVEIRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $367.93 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, JOSE D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED NOV-08-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, JOSE D.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-05-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES AGREE THAT THE DEFENDANT WILL MAKE PAYMENTS MONTHLY. IF NO PAYMENTS MADE TO PLAINTIFF AS AGREED, PLAINTIFF WILL ASK THE COURT FOR A JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY NANCY ANGEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY OMAR OSORIO--LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE OLIVEIRA, JOSE D. $367.93 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $452.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
